title: A Matter of Creation
description: With the newly updated Create mod at it's heart, play with its new possibilities with other cosmetic and gameplay additions!
body:
# A Matter of Creation


_🔧 An immersive modpack exploring the limitless potential of Create 6.0 in a breathtaking world._

You awaken in a vast and beautifully sculpted world, shaped by the forces of nature and the **ingenuity of creation**. Towering mountains, rolling hills, and expansive continents invite you to explore and build in ways never before possible. With the latest Create 6.0 update at your fingertips, you’ll craft intricate machines, harness powerful energy, and push the boundaries of automation. But innovation is only part of the journey—"**A Matter of Creation**" is also about experiencing a visually stunning world, where every biome tells a story and every structure holds purpose.

### Key Features
🌍 **Breathtaking World Generation** – Explore vast, dynamic landscapes with Tectonic and Continents

⚙️ **Engineering & Automation** – Build advanced contraptions with Create and Create: Dreams & Desires

🛩️ **Flight & Exploration** – Take to the skies with Immersive Aircraft and travel efficiently using Waystones

🔋 **Industry & Power** – Utilize Immersive Engineering to fuel your creations
👹 New Encounters – Face fresh challenges with Friends & Foes

🏡 **Comfort & Survival** – Rest with Comforts and immerse yourself in the world

🎨 **Enhanced Visuals** – Experience a richly detailed environment with Chipped, Chisel Reborn, Handcrafted, Falling Leaves, Visuality: Reforged, and Supplementaries

## Why Play "**A Matter of Creation**"?
🚀 Experience the Full Potential of Create 6.0 – Experiment with its latest mechanics in an optimized modpack
🌎 A Stunning, Handcrafted World – Unique terrain generation makes every playthrough feel fresh
🔧 Balanced for Creativity & Adventure – Whether you're an automation expert, an explorer, or a builder, there's something for you

### Before You Play

🔹 **Recommended Specs**: A mid-to-high-end PC is advised for optimal performance due to enhanced world generation and visuals.
**{Minimum Memory: 4GB**
**| Recommended Memory: 6GB+}**

🔹 **Multiplayer-Friendly**: Designed for both solo and server play
